title: Ben's Bundles - Bare Bones
description: Trailer version of Ben's Bundles, the 3D bundle pack
body:
## About Retexture of [Ben's Bundles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bens-bundles), the resource pack that adds 3D bundles in hand while keeping the 2D sprite in GUI to fit the Trailer style that packs like [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) and [Trailers Vision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trailers-vision) offer. ### NOTE: The 2D sprite is not incuded in the pack so you can choose to use either Trailers Vision or Barebones (or something else!)
At the time of upload, Trailers Vision is the only pack that has bundle texutres. ## Showcase render ![Steve holding a purple bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b2731928ac29f308a4af6603cb97ceeccd25c2f.jpeg) Rendered in Blender using models and textures included in the resource pack ## Vanilla version: have a look at the the oriognal pack if you found this but play with vanilla textures: [Ben's Bundles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bens-bundles) ### Contact: @bennymccarthy on Discord DO NOT DISTRIBUTE
